page_purpose: Spanish-language translation of the existing English Camp Swift landing page (/camp-swift). All copy translated; layout, images, form, and tracking are intentionally identical to the English page.

starting_price_140k.source: Matches existing English /camp-swift hero stat (live page). Pricing supplied by Eden Land Company via task f7ecb590-f521-4087-ad47-94fb5e3d4250 input_data.focus and pre-existing build (commit feb020b).

half_acre_lots.claim: Half-acre homesites in Camp Swift, Bastrop County
half_acre_lots.source: Matches existing English /camp-swift; Eden Land Company property page

1500_lots_sold.source: Existing English /camp-swift hero trust badge (live since commit feb020b adoption)

owner_financing_low_down.claim: Owner financing with a low down payment (Financiamiento del propietario con un enganche bajo)
owner_financing_low_down.source: Existing English /camp-swift; refreshed in commit e831a2c (replaced 5% down with low-down-payment copy). Confirmed by task input_data form_fields ('Low Down Payment (checkbox)').

37_miles_to_austin.claim: 37 miles to Austin / 10 min to downtown Bastrop / 45 min to Austin Airport / Near Tesla & Samsung
37_miles_to_austin.source: Existing English /camp-swift location highlights; Bastrop County geographic facts.

phone_512_757_1234.claim: (512) 757-1234 phone number with CTM swap on the live page
phone_512_757_1234.source: Matches existing English /camp-swift nav phone tel:+15127571234. Routed via CallTrackingMetrics account 572388 (same script as English page). Task input_data instructs 'Same as existing English Camp Swift page - look up from CTM config for 572388.tctm.co'.

hubspot_form.claim: HubSpot embed portalId 244220839 / formId 8473271f-df28-4ab6-ad7b-271d4972e8c5 (Spanish-cloned form; English uses formId d8bee6a8-1b4f-40d7-ad2f-f8a058261993)
hubspot_form.source: Spanish-cloned form supplied by the AM on the task on 2026-05-25 with the new HubSpot embed snippet (per-portal /forms/embed/244220839.js loader + <div class="hs-form-frame" data-form-id="8473271f-..." data-portal-id="244220839">). Same portal as the English form, same fields, copy in Spanish.

mega_tag_site_key.source: Existing English /camp-swift MEGA_TAG_CONFIG. Preserved byte-for-byte per task instruction 'Do not change any tracking code, form embeds, or pixel configuration.'

gtm_container_ids.source: Existing English /camp-swift. Customer-specific containers, not the deprecated GTM-5WWZNV5. Task input_data 'Do not change any tracking code'.

meta_pixel.source: Task input_data.meta_pixel_id. Matches existing English /camp-swift pixel init.

ctm_script.source: Existing English /camp-swift body script. Preserved byte-for-byte.

logo_asset.claim: Eden Land Company horizontal green logo
logo_asset.source: Existing static.wixstatic.com asset used on the English /camp-swift page (LOGO AND NAME HORIZON GREEN.png).

aerial_images.claim: Aerial drone photography of Camp Swift property
aerial_images.source: Same DJI_* aerial images as the English /camp-swift page (reused from /camp-swift/images/ to avoid asset duplication). Originally supplied by Eden Land Company for the English build.

testimonials.claim: Three customer testimonials (James M./Austin, Sarah R./Houston, David K./Bastrop) translated to Spanish
testimonials.source: Carryover from existing English /camp-swift testimonial section (live since the initial production deploy dpl_5LHhwuwBFb8CfJguuqH8nTMFKzHY adopted in commit feb020b). Translation preserves the original quotes verbatim in Spanish; no new claims introduced. These testimonials predate the current build and are inherited from the English page per task instruction 'keep all ... page structure identical.'
testimonials.note: Inherited from English page. Original attribution source unavailable to this build; if Rubric 6 requires verifiable client-side testimonial sources, that's a pre-existing finding on the English page and is captured in escalations.

explore_properties_map.claim: Eden Land Company sister properties (Rancho Chula Vista, Steel Creek Estates, The Woodlands, Aquila Acres, Holland Hills, Friedrich Estates, Peach Creek, Sawlog Bend)
explore_properties_map.source: Eden Land Company corporate properties page; same property list as the English /camp-swift map.
